data.name: Install the latest graphics card driver.
data.value: Install the latest graphics card driver.

data.name: Error9AHackingToolHasBeen
data.value: [error9] A hacking tool has been found. If you are not using a hacking tool, contact our customer service center through our website at support.http://muonline.webzen.com

data.name: DoYouEvenKnowAboutMe
data.value: 'Do you even know about me? I've been both blessed and cursed from Lugard. You may be helped if you are appropriately qualified.'

data.name: IfYouHavePassedThroughThe
data.value: If you have passed through the Apostle Devin's test, Werewolf Guardsman will send you and your party members Balgass' Barrack.

data.name: InOrderToReceiveHelpFrom
data.value: In order to receive help from Werewolf Guardsman; you must pay him 3,000,000 Zen.

data.name: 'Hmm, who are you? I'm confused. Are you even approved of Balgass?
data.value: 'Hmm, who are you? I'm confused. Are you even approved of Balgass?

data.name: LugadrS12ApostlesAreHelping
data.value: Lugadr's 12 apostles are helping by blinding the gatekeeper by the road to Balgass' Resting Place.

data.name: Return's the enemy's attack power in %d%%
data.value: Return's the enemy's attack power in %d%%

data.name: Complete recovery of life in %d%% rate
data.value: Complete recovery of life in %d%% rate

data.name: Complete recover of Mana in %d%% rate
data.value: Complete recover of Mana in %d%% rate

data.name: YouMustBeLocatedCloselyTogether
data.value: You must be located closely together in order to enter Balgass' Barrack at once.

data.name: ApostleDevinSThirdMissionRequest
data.value: Apostle Devin's third mission request enables entrance into the resting place.

data.name: Fenrir's Horn, Scroll of Blood, Condor's Feather
data.value: Fenrir's Horn, Scroll of Blood, Condor's Feather

data.name: Character level above %d cannot be deleted.
data.value: Character level above %d cannot be deleted.

data.name: You can now stand alone without my support.
data.value: You can now stand alone without my support.

data.name: I'll be your strength for the journey to become a warrior.
data.value: I'll be your strength for the journey to become a warrior.

data.name: Damage and defense increased with a blessing.

data.name: Would you like to repair Fenrir's horn?

data.value: Exclusive edition only given to MU Heroes

data.name: The applied equipments cannot be reset.
data.value: The applied equipments cannot be reset.

data.name: Click on the button to reinitialize all stat points.
data.value: Click on the button to reinitialize all stat points.

data.name: Register with the NPC to receive various gifts.
data.value: Register with the NPC to receive various gifts.

data.value: It can be used with item removed.

data.value: To decrease the fruit, weapons, armors and others must be removed.

data.value: Impossible since the usable fruit points are at maximum.

data.name: Cannot be decreased under the default stat value.
data.value: Cannot be decreased under the default stat value.

data.name: FragmentOfHornCanBeMade
data.value: Fragment of horn can be made using the Divine protection of Goddess and fragment of armor.

data.name: Broken horn can be made using the claw of beast and fragment of horn.
data.value: Broken horn can be made using the claw of beast and fragment of horn.

data.name: Fenrir's horn can be made through item combination.
data.value: Fenrir's horn can be made through item combination.

data.value: Can summon the Fenrir when equipped.

data.name: When the attack is successful it will decrease the durability of
data.value: When the attack is successful it will decrease the durability of

data.name: one of the certain weapons to 50%%.
data.value: one of the certain weapons to 50%%.

data.name: use the Lucky Coins you already have
data.value: use the Lucky Coins you already have

data.name: We need a guardian to protect the wolf.
data.value: We need a guardian to protect the wolf.

data.name: You have been registered to be a guardian to protect the wolf.
data.value: You have been registered to be a guardian to protect the wolf.

data.name: Your role as a guardian will be cancelled when you warp.
data.value: Your role as a guardian will be cancelled when you warp.

data.name: Contract can't be made when you are on a mount.
data.value: Contract can't be made when you are on a mount.

data.name: Feel the unusual forces around the Fortress of Crywolf.
data.value: Feel the unusual forces around the Fortress of Crywolf.

data.name: ThePowerOfTheWolfStatue
data.value: The power of the Wolf statue is weakening. Feel the evil sprit getting stronger.

data.name: Crywolf is asking for your help. Only you can save this continent.
data.value: Crywolf is asking for your help. Only you can save this continent.

data.name: Other siege team is running the crown switch.
data.value: Other siege team is running the crown switch.

data.name: 5%% increase in castle and arena invitation combine rate.
data.value: 5%% increase in castle and arena invitation combine rate.

data.name: Contract is ongoing therefore dual compact is not possible.
data.value: Contract is ongoing therefore dual compact is not possible.

data.name: Further contract can't be done since the altar has been destroyed.
data.value: Further contract can't be done since the altar has been destroyed.

data.name: Only level above 350 is allowed to make a contract.
data.value: Only level above 350 is allowed to make a contract.

data.name: Contract can be made for %d times.
data.value: Contract can be made for %d times.

data.name: Would you like to proceed with the contract?
data.value: Would you like to proceed with the contract?

data.name: Please try again in a while.
data.value: Please try again in a while.

data.name: All NPCs in Crywolf have been deleted.
data.value: All NPCs in Crywolf have been deleted.

data.name: Drop it to receive the gift.
data.value: Drop it to receive the gift.

data.name: Would you like to receive the item?
data.value: Would you like to receive the item?

data.name: Failed to get an item. Please try again.
data.value: Failed to get an item. Please try again.

data.name: This is not a event prize.
data.value: This is not a event prize.

data.name: Arrow will not decrease during activation
data.value: Arrow will not decrease during activation

data.name: Can be used during Castle Siege with required Kill Count
data.value: Can be used during Castle Siege with required Kill Count

data.name: Can be used from the mount item
data.value: Can be used from the mount item

data.name: What would you like to know?
data.value: What would you like to know?

data.name: You may now proceed to the Refinery Tower.
data.value: You may now proceed to the Refinery Tower.

data.name: Path to the Refinery Tower is now opened.
data.value: Path to the Refinery Tower is now opened.

data.name: Path to the Refinery Tower will be closed in %d hours.
data.value: Path to the Refinery Tower will be closed in %d hours.

data.name: DPlayersAreTryingToOpen
data.value: %d players are trying to open the path to the Refinery Tower. You can't enter the Refinery Tower, automated defense system has been activated.

data.name: Currently %d players are in battle with Maya's lefe hand.
data.value: Currently %d players are in battle with Maya's lefe hand.

data.name: Currently %d players are in battle with Maya's right hand.
data.value: Currently %d players are in battle with Maya's right hand.

data.name: Currently %d players are in battle with Maya's both hands.
data.value: Currently %d players are in battle with Maya's both hands.

data.name: Currently %d players are in battle with Nightmare.
data.value: Currently %d players are in battle with Nightmare.

data.name: ForceOfTheNightmareHasInvaded
data.value: Force of the Nightmare has invaded the Tower. Tower is unstable therefore the entrance to the Tower will be restricted for %d minutes.

data.name: DefeatTheNightmareThatControllingThe
data.value: Defeat the Nightmare that controlling the Maya to enter the Refinery Tower.

data.name: EntranceIsRestrictedToEnsureThe
data.value: Entrance is restricted to ensure the security of Maya. 'Moonstone Pendant' is required.

data.name: You will be able to approach Maya shortly.
data.value: You will be able to approach Maya shortly.

data.name: More players are needed to open the path to the Tower.
data.value: More players are needed to open the path to the Tower.

data.name: NightmareHasLostTheControlOf2165
data.value: Nightmare has lost the control of Maya's left hand. Currently there are %d survivors.

data.name: NightmareHasLostTheControlOf2166
data.value: Nightmare has lost the control of Maya's right hand. Currently there are %d surviors.

data.name: More power from %d players are needed.
data.value: More power from %d players are needed.

data.name: Nightmare has lost the control of Maya's left hand.
data.value: Nightmare has lost the control of Maya's left hand.

data.name: You can't warp to the Refinery Tower.
data.value: You can't warp to the Refinery Tower.

data.name: You can't warp wearing the Ring of Transformation.
data.value: You can't warp wearing the Ring of Transformation.

data.name: YouCanOnlyWarpRidingA
data.value: You can only warp riding a Dynorant, Dark Horse, Fenrir or wearing the wings, cloak.

data.name: GemstoneOfJewelOfHarmonyHas
data.value: Gemstone of Jewel of Harmony has a sealed power. Magical energy and special ability can remove the seal and it's called as the refinery.

data.name: NewPowerCanBeGrantedTo
data.value: New power can be granted to the item using the power of refined Jewel of Harmony.

data.name: I.D. of Kantur Chief Scientist. You can enter the Refinery Tower.
data.value: I.D. of Kantur Chief Scientist. You can enter the Refinery Tower.

data.name: Grant actual power to reinforced item.
data.value: Grant actual power to reinforced item.

data.name: RefineryHasStartedRefineryIsA
data.value: Refinery has started. Refinery is a part of process to change the item to Refining Stone to be reinforced. Refined item will be disapper, make sure to check the item.

data.name: This item is not allowed to use the private store.
data.value: This item is not allowed to use the private store.

data.name: Fireworks will appear once thrown in the field.
data.value: Fireworks will appear once thrown in the field.

data.name: Increases the combination rate,but only up to the maximum rate.
data.value: Increases the combination rate,but only up to the maximum rate.

data.name: Increases experience gained and item drop rate.
data.value: Increases experience gained and item drop rate.

data.name: You can achieve special items with combinations.
data.value: You can achieve special items with combinations.

data.name: Combinations can be used once at a time
data.value: Combinations can be used once at a time

data.name: Congratulations. Please contact CS team and change it to item.
data.value: Congratulations. Please contact CS team and change it to item.

data.name: You will be assigned to a stage according to your level.
data.value: You will be assigned to a stage according to your level.

data.name: Not enough space. Please check free space in your inventory.
data.value: Not enough space. Please check free space in your inventory.

data.name: More than 2 X 4 space in inventory is needed.
data.value: More than 2 X 4 space in inventory is needed.

data.name: GM has gifted this special box.
data.value: GM has gifted this special box.

data.name: You can only use this in a safe zone.
data.value: You can only use this in a safe zone.

data.name: from above the level %d, %s enabled and on.
data.value: from above the level %d, %s enabled and on.

data.name: Do you wish to go to the Illusion Temple?
data.value: Do you wish to go to the Illusion Temple?

data.name: WeHaveEnteredTheHeartOf
data.value: We have entered the heart of the Illusion Temple. The sacred items of this temple are our ultimate goal. Move as many sacred items as you can to our storage. The brave one will certainly be compensated

data.name: The allies are advancing on. We are not far from the victory! Charge on!
data.value: The allies are advancing on. We are not far from the victory! Charge on!

data.name: AlthoughWeHaveLostThisBattle
data.value: Although we have lost this battle, we will continue on until the allies win!

data.name: ListenToThisTheAlliesHave
data.value: Listen to this. The allies have approached the entrance of this temple. We must fight with all our might and keep the temple from them so that we may secure the sacred items as they are.

data.name: HoorayForTheIllusionSorceryWe
data.value: Hooray for the Illusion Sorcery! We are almost there! Come to the frontier now!

data.name: YouMustNotLoseTheTemple
data.value: You must not lose the temple. Let us prepare for the battle to secure this temple.

data.name: You must be of the minimum level 220 to enter the zone.
data.value: You must be of the minimum level 220 to enter the zone.

data.name: The admission and scroll levels do not match.
data.value: The admission and scroll levels do not match.

data.name: You cannot enter the zone with the number of members exceeding the limit.
data.value: You cannot enter the zone with the number of members exceeding the limit.

data.name: AssembleTheScrollOfBloodWith
data.value: Assemble the Scroll of Blood with the contract from the Illusion Sorcery.

data.name: Assemble the Scroll of Blood with the old scrolls.
data.value: Assemble the Scroll of Blood with the old scrolls.

data.name: This is a mark of Illusion Sorcery; this is required to enter the temple.
data.value: This is a mark of Illusion Sorcery; this is required to enter the temple.

data.name: The stone statue appears randomly from one of the two locations.
data.value: The stone statue appears randomly from one of the two locations.

data.name: The sacred item may be achieved by clicking on the stone statue.
data.value: The sacred item may be achieved by clicking on the stone statue.

data.name: BeCautiousOfTheFactThat
data.value: Be cautious of the fact that the mobility slows down while carrying the sacred items.

data.name: ClickOnTheStorageOfThe
data.value: Click on the storage of the sacred item from the start location; and you will gain the points accordingly.

data.name: The goal is to achieve as many points as possible within the given period.
data.value: The goal is to achieve as many points as possible within the given period.

data.name: The stone statue reappears after the storage. Look for the statue.
data.value: The stone statue reappears after the storage. Look for the statue.

data.name: YouMayAchieveTheKillPoints
data.value: You may achieve the kill points from hunting monsters and the opponent players in their zone.

data.name: Mouse wheel button ? change skill types, Shift + mouse right-click ? use
data.value: Mouse wheel button ? change skill types, Shift + mouse right-click ? use

data.name: ThereAre4TypesOfSkills
data.value: There are 4 types of skills that can be appropriately used for each situation.

data.name: You may be compensated by clicking on the Close button.
data.value: You may be compensated by clicking on the Close button.

data.name: You are current gaining the sacred item.
data.value: You are current gaining the sacred item.

data.name: You are currently storing the sacred item.
data.value: You are currently storing the sacred item.

data.name: You may continue to use the strengthener power.
data.value: You may continue to use the strengthener power.

data.name: There's an increase effect to it.
data.value: There's an increase effect to it.

data.name: This is more than the value of your resettable points.
data.value: This is more than the value of your resettable points.

data.name: You cannot use this item while the Potion effects remain active.
data.value: You cannot use this item while the Potion effects remain active.

data.name: Collect Cherry Blossoms and take it to the spirit for item compensation.
data.value: Collect Cherry Blossoms and take it to the spirit for item compensation.

data.name: Only the same type of Cherry Blossoms branches can be uploaded.
data.value: Only the same type of Cherry Blossoms branches can be uploaded.

data.name: Master Level EXP cannot be achieved during the item usage.
data.value: Master Level EXP cannot be achieved during the item usage.

data.name: EXP achievement and the automatic life recovery rate increases.
data.value: EXP achievement and the automatic life recovery rate increases.

data.name: Automatic Mana recovery increment in %d%% rate
data.value: Automatic Mana recovery increment in %d%% rate

data.name: Item achievement and the automatic Mana recovery increases onward.
data.value: Item achievement and the automatic Mana recovery increases onward.

data.name: Increases Attack Power and Wizardry by 40%%
data.value: Increases Attack Power and Wizardry by 40%%

data.name: Welcome to Santa's Village. Please come claim your gift.
data.value: Welcome to Santa's Village. Please come claim your gift.

data.name: Would you like to return to Devias?
data.value: Would you like to return to Devias?

data.name: WelcomeToSantaSVillageHere
data.value: Welcome to Santa's Village. Here's a gift for you. You will always find something to bring you a fortune here.

data.name: Relocate to the Santa's Village by the right-mouse click.
data.value: Relocate to the Santa's Village by the right-mouse click.

data.name: Would you like to move to the Santa's Village?
data.value: Would you like to move to the Santa's Village?

data.name: The attack and defense power have increased.
data.value: The attack and defense power have increased.

data.name: Maximum Life has been increased of %d.
data.value: Maximum Life has been increased of %d.

data.value: AG recovery speed has increased of %d.

data.value: Remember the location of one's death.

data.name: Saves the location with the right-mouse-click.

data.value: Returns to the saved location by a click.

data.value: You cannot use the item at certain applicable locations.

data.value: This item cannot be used along with an item that's already in use.

data.name: Extract the seed or the seed sphere
data.value: Extract the seed or the seed sphere

data.name: or destroy the seed sphere accordingly.

data.value: It's already applied on the character.

data.value: You must select the destructible socket.

data.value: There are no destructible seed spheres.

data.name: +10~+15 When upgrading level item please put it in combination window.

data.name: allowed them to reach the point line.
data.value: allowed them to reach the point line.

data.name: It's a sign infused with traces of dimensions.
data.value: It's a sign infused with traces of dimensions.

data.name: Collect five and the signs will automatically
data.value: Collect five and the signs will automatically

data.name: transform into a Mirror of Dimensions.

data.name: That's the only thing that will get Lugard to help you

data.name: It contains Gaion's plans for the destruction of the empire

data.name: and orders for the Empire Guardians.

data.name: You may enter the Fortress of Empire Guardians.
data.value: You may enter the Fortress of Empire Guardians.

data.name: It's a worn piece of paper containing incomprehensible text.
data.value: It's a worn piece of paper containing incomprehensible text.

data.value: You have reached your Zen limit.

data.name: IfYouGiveUpYouWill
data.value: If you give up, you will not be able to continue with this or any related quests. Do you really want to give up?

data.value: be accessed if you have a

data.value: You can only enter as a member of a party.

data.name: Register 255 Lucky Coins during the event
data.value: Register 255 Lucky Coins during the event

data.name: Please check the web page for the event details.

data.name: You can only apply once per your account.
data.value: You can only apply once per your account.

data.name: Battle has already commenced. You cannot enter.

data.value: You cannot enter if you are a 1st Stage Outlaw.

data.name: Dueling is not possible in this area.
data.value: Dueling is not possible in this area.

data.name: YouCanDoAGoblinCombination2875
data.value: You can do a Goblin combination with a Sealed Golden Box to create a Golden Box.

data.name: YouCanDoAGoblinCombination2876
data.value: You can do a Goblin combination with a Sealed Silver Box to create a Silver Box.

data.name: You can do a Goblin combination with a Gold Key to create a Golden Box.
data.value: You can do a Goblin combination with a Gold Key to create a Golden Box.

data.name: You can do a Goblin combination with a Silver Key to create a Silver Box.
data.value: You can do a Goblin combination with a Silver Key to create a Silver Box.

data.value: You can drop it with a fixed probability of it turning into a rare item.

data.value: Do you wish to buy the following item(s)?

data.name: Bought items used or taken out of storage cannot be returned.
data.value: Bought items used or taken out of storage cannot be returned.

data.name: DoYouWishToUseS
data.value: Do you wish to use %s?##*With the exception of seals and scrolls, all items will be transferred to your Inventory.##Items removed from storage or gift inventory cannot be recovered or returned.

data.name: ThisWillDeleteTheSelectedItem
data.value: This will delete the selected item.##Deleted items cannot be recovered or returned. Delete the item?

data.name: ThisFunctionIsNotSupportedIn
data.value: This function is not supported in the MU Item Shop.##Please use the MU Online website.

data.name: This item is not currently available.
data.value: This item is not currently available.

data.name: This item is no longer available.
data.value: This item is no longer available.

data.value: You can acquire Goblin Points by using the MU Item Shop's storage.

data.name: It's a box containing various items.
data.value: It's a box containing various items.

data.name: The Command window cannot be activated in Battle Zone.
data.value: The Command window cannot be activated in Battle Zone.

data.name: You cannot form a party with a member of the opposing gens.
data.value: You cannot form a party with a member of the opposing gens.

data.value: The guild master is with a different gens.

data.name: YouMustBelongToTheSame
data.value: You must belong to the same gens as the guild master in order to join the guild.

data.name: You cannot form a party within a Battle Zone.
data.value: You cannot form a party within a Battle Zone.

data.name: Parties are not activated within a Battle Zone.

data.value: Using the %s item will negate the current %s buff.##Would you like to use the %s item anyway?

data.name: The amount of contribution needed for promotion to the next rank is %d.

data.name: GensRankingRewardsAreGivenOut
data.value: Gens ranking rewards are given out with the patch in the first week of each month.

data.name: GensRankingRewardsCanBeClaimed
data.value: Gens ranking rewards can be claimed from the gens steward NPC.## Gens rewards will automatically disappear if not claimed within a week.

data.value: Can enter the Monday - Saturday map.

data.value: You can enter to Gold Channel.

data.value: Right click on your inventory to use.

data.name: Exceeded maximum amount of Zen you can possess.
data.value: Exceeded maximum amount of Zen you can possess.

data.name: You have selected an incorrect W Coin type. Please select again.
data.value: You have selected an incorrect W Coin type. Please select again.

data.name: You cannot accept any more quest.
data.value: You cannot accept any more quest.

data.name: You need to clear at least 1 quest to
data.value: You need to clear at least 1 quest to

data.name: YouCannotUseTheTalismanOf
data.value: You cannot use the Talisman of Chaos Assembly and Talisman of Luck together.

data.name: Jewel used for repairing a Lucky Item.
data.value: Jewel used for repairing a Lucky Item.

data.name: You can't raise any more levels.
data.value: You can't raise any more levels.

data.name: You must meet all skill requirements.
data.value: You must meet all skill requirements.

data.name: You need to wear the required equipment to level up this skill.
data.value: You need to wear the required equipment to level up this skill.

data.name: Buff Duration for All Party Members
data.value: Buff Duration for All Party Members

data.name: InOrderToUseComboSkill
data.value: In order to use Combo Skill, Basic Skill and Activation Skill should be registered first

data.name: %d zen(s) have been spent in implementing Official MU Helper
data.value: %d zen(s) have been spent in implementing Official MU Helper
